title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends warm greetings to our Nari Shakti on International Women's Day
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends warm greetings to our Nari Shakti on International Women's Day

Humankind is indebted to the peerless role Nari Shakti plays in society
Nurturing generations and driving scientific and economic progress, they contribute to every aspect of our lives
This deep gratitude drives Modi Ji's vision of women-led development, where women are no longer just witnesses to progress but the changemakers who pave our journey to greatness

Posted On:
08 MAR 2026 3:52PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah has extended warm greetings to our Nari Shakti on International Women's Day.

In a post on X platform, Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah said “Warm greetings to our Nari Shakti on International Women's Day. Humankind is indebted to the peerless role Nari Shakti plays in society. Nurturing generations and driving scientific and economic progress, they contribute to every aspect of our lives. This deep gratitude drives Modi Ji's vision of women-led development, where women are no longer just witnesses to progress but the changemakers who pave our journey to greatness.”

Warm greetings to our Nari Shakti on International Women's Day.
Humankind is indebted to the peerless role Nari Shakti plays in society. Nurturing generations and driving scientific and economic progress, they contribute to every aspect of our lives. This deep gratitude drives…
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 8, 2026

***
